zh.lifeSummary: 當Margareta Dukinfield於大約1405年出生在英國爾度金費爾德時，她的父親Robert Dukinfield26歲，母親Ellen Brereton21歲。她於1429年與Raufe Radus de Hyde結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1479年在她的家鄉享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margareta Dukinfield于大约1405年出生在英国爾度金費爾德时，她的父亲Robert Dukinfield26岁，母亲Ellen Brereton21岁。她于1429年与Raufe Radus de Hyde结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1479年在她的家乡享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margareta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margrethe
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margaretha
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margareta Dukinfield was born about 1405, in Dukinfield, Cheshire, England, her father, Robert Dukinfield, was 26 and her mother, Ellen Brereton, was 21. She married Raufe Radus de Hyde in 1429. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1479, in her hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margareta Dukinfield est née environ 1405, à Dukinfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Dukinfield, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Ellen Brereton, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Raufe Radus de Hyde en 1429. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1479, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margareta Dukinfield um 1405 in Dukinfield, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Dukinfield 26 und ihre Mutter Ellen Brereton 21. Sie hat 1429 Raufe Radus de Hyde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1479 im Alter von 75 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margareta Dukinfield è nata il circa 1405 nel Dukinfield, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Robert Dukinfield, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Ellen Brereton, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Raufe Radus de Hyde nel 1429. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1479, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margareta Dukinfield(이)가 대략 1405년 영국 체실르 드킨필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Dukinfield(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Brereton(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1429년 Raufe Radus de Hyde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1479년 그녀의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margareta Dukinfield nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em Dukinfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Dukinfield, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Brereton, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Raufe Radus de Hyde em 1429. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1479, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margareta Dukinfield родилась около 1405 г. в местности дукинфиелд, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Dukinfield было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Brereton, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raufe Radus de Hyde в 1429 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1479 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margareta Dukinfield nació aproximadamente 1405, en Dukinfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Dukinfield, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Ellen Brereton, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Raufe Radus de Hyde en 1429. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1479, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años.
